title: Arctic Survival
description: The cold and harsh weather will prove survival difficult. Are you up for the task?
body:
# Alaskan Wilderness by Forge Labs ![Forge Labs Divider](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f83f327701a64468e9152ecf2450c0ef1be54a3f.png)
Can you survive the harsh weather of winter? Can you defend yourself against the animals that are still awake?
![Forge Labs Divider](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f83f327701a64468e9152ecf2450c0ef1be54a3f.png) ![Forge Labs Divider](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f83f327701a64468e9152ecf2450c0ef1be54a3f.png)
### Notice For the best experience with Distant Horizons, we recommend preloading the chunks in your world with Chunky. If you have major lag, lower the quality of Distant Horizons or remove it entirely. It is recommended that you allocate 8GB of RAM to Minecraft if you intend to use shaders with this modpack.
![Forge Labs Divider](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f83f327701a64468e9152ecf2450c0ef1be54a3f.png)
### Socials


![Forge Labs Divider](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f83f327701a64468e9152ecf2450c0ef1be54a3f.png)
